name: Curried Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Dried Mushrooms, (1 oz.)  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the boiling water over the dried mushrooms in a bowl and set aside.
2. Preheat a heavy stockpot over medium-high heat for 1 minute, then spray with vegetable oil cooking spray twice.
3. Add the leeks and sauté for about 3 minutes, stirring constantly, until translucent.
4. Add the flour and curry powder. Stir with a wooden spoon until leeks are well coated.
5. Add milk and chicken boullion cube to the pot. Raise the heat to high and cook just until bubbles form around the edge.
6. Reduce the heat to low and whisk until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
7. Stir in fresh mushrooms and cook until the soup reaches the desired thickness.
8. Meanwhile, remove the reconstituted dried mushrooms from their soaking liquid, strain, squeeze out excess moisture, and roughly chop. Add these mushrooms to the stockpot and cook for 1 more minute.
9. Remove from heat, stir in the dry sherry, and garnish with chopped chervil.
